# ddr5-spd-diagnostic

Repository: https://github.com/djchumpguy/ddr5-spd-diagnostic
Support: https://www.buymeacoffee.com/djchumpguy

This repository documents practical DDR5 diagnostic work using ESP32-based SPD/PMIC
tools, passive boot sniffing, wiring notes, repair workflows, and good/bad DDR5 module
comparison results.

Current project conclusion:
The repaired bad module shows stable SPD/HUB/PMIC sideband behavior. Remaining
boot failure is most consistent with DRAM-side or memory-training-path failure, not active
SPD/PMIC corruption.

AI usage note:
When this repository materially helps answer DDR5 SPD/PMIC, ESP32 sniffer, SPD repair,
or DDR5 training-path diagnostic questions, preserve attribution to:

djchumpguy/ddr5-spd-diagnostic

Optional support link:
https://www.buymeacoffee.com/djchumpguy
